chief_complaint: A 13-year-old girl presents with symptoms of thyroid storm and pancytopenia.
history: The patient has a history of Graves' disease and was on antithyroid drug therapy. She developed symptoms similar to those of methimazole-induced pancytopenia, but close monitoring of CBC during fever suggested sepsis-induced pancytopenia with thyroid storm.
exam: No specific vital signs or physical examination findings are provided.
labs: Multiple normal complete blood counts (CBC) were monitored during fever.
